name: pccx-systemverilog-ide-prototype
description: Experimental local VS Code extension scaffold for the PCCX SystemVerilog IDE prototype; not published.

commands.title: PCCX SystemVerilog: Publish Checked Example Diagnostics (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Checked Example Navigation (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Publish Live Workspace Diagnostics (Experimental, Opt-In)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Live Workspace Navigation (Experimental, Opt-In)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Diagnostics Example
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Navigation Example
PCCX SystemVerilog: Run Diagnostics Live (Experimental, Opt-In Alias)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Run Navigation Live (Experimental, Opt-In Alias)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show AI Assistant Status (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Build AI Context Bundle (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Propose Validation Command (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Audit Validation Proposal Preflight (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Run Approved Validation Command (Experimental, Opt-In)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Recent Validation Results (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Validation Cache Status (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Clear Validation Result Cache (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Patch Proposal Preview (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Clear Patch Proposal Preview (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Local Workflow Status (Experimental)
PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Context Bundle Audit (Experimental)

PCCX SystemVerilog: Show Diagnostics Handoff Summary (Experimental)

pccxSystemVerilog.mode.description: Experimental local prototype setting selecting checked-example mode or explicit live workspace mode for prototype commands; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.liveWorkspace.enabled.description: Experimental local prototype opt-in gate for live workspace commands; checked-example mode remains the default and this is not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.pccxLab.command.description: Experimental local prototype command-boundary name for the pccx-lab CLI-first backend; no arguments, no direct internals, and not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.aiAssistant.enabled.description: Experimental local prototype opt-in flag reserved for future AI-assisted SystemVerilog development workflow boundaries; no provider calls and not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.aiAssistant.backend.description: Experimental local prototype AI assistant backend selector for future controlled tool boundaries; no runtime calls in this scaffold and not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.validationRunner.enabl.description: Experimental local prototype opt-in gate for approved validation runner execution; disabled by default and not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.validationRunner.mode.description: Experimental local prototype validation runner mode; allowlisted mode must be explicit and is not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.validationRunner.defau.description: Experimental local prototype working-directory label for approved validation runner commands; fixed allowlisted commands may override it and this is not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.validationRunner.maxOu.description: Experimental local prototype maximum stdout/stderr lines retained in approved validation summaries; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.validationRunner.timeo.description: Experimental local prototype timeout in milliseconds for approved validation runner commands; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.pythonPath.description: Experimental local prototype Python executable used by the live CLI prototype path; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultSource.description: Experimental local prototype workspace-relative default SystemVerilog source used by live diagnostics; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultLog.description: Experimental local prototype workspace-relative default synthetic xsim-style log used by live diagnostics; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultNavigationRoot.description: Experimental local prototype workspace-relative source root used by live navigation; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultModule.description: Experimental local prototype default module name used by navigation examples; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultDeclarationKind.description: Experimental local prototype default declaration kind used by navigation; not a stable API.
